name: Phishing Email Investigation & Response
description: Automated investigation and response workflow for reported phishing emails. Extracts IOCs, checks reputation, and takes containment actions.

action--d90d67dc-7c6d-4572-91c4-ead80827.name: Extract Email Metadata
action--d90d67dc-7c6d-4572-91c4-ead80827.description: Parse email headers, extract sender, recipient, subject, SPF/DKIM/DMARC results

action--d9505917-ded1-4aee-8efe-592d1e91.name: Extract IOCs
action--d9505917-ded1-4aee-8efe-592d1e91.description: Extract URLs, domains, IP addresses, and file hashes from email body and attachments

commands.description: Extract all IOCs from email content

action--3741a69e-b82e-4a63-bc2c-c530c2f6.name: Check URL Reputation
action--3741a69e-b82e-4a63-bc2c-c530c2f6.description: Query VirusTotal, URLScan.io, and internal threat intelligence for URL reputation

action--f9fde2cd-77e7-4336-8bbd-0ffd17e1.name: Check Sender Reputation
action--f9fde2cd-77e7-4336-8bbd-0ffd17e1.description: Verify sender domain age, WHOIS data, and historical email patterns

if-condition--9e883947-9d28-480c-b0b7-8a.name: Is Email Malicious?
if-condition--9e883947-9d28-480c-b0b7-8a.description: Decision point based on aggregated threat intelligence results

action--f8a6bf2c-61a5-4ded-b158-b985d488.name: Block Sender Domain
action--f8a6bf2c-61a5-4ded-b158-b985d488.description: Add sender domain to email gateway blocklist and firewall deny list

commands.description: Block sender domain on email gateway

action--c69bda88-fff7-4bd3-8752-bf38b138.name: Search for Other Recipients
action--c69bda88-fff7-4bd3-8752-bf38b138.description: Search email logs for other employees who received the same email

commands.description: Find all recipients of the phishing campaign

action--740efb17-b264-4eae-b026-9305cdff.name: Delete Phishing Emails
action--740efb17-b264-4eae-b026-9305cdff.description: Purge the phishing email from all recipients mailboxes

action--a7b560cb-d1ed-48f5-915b-9ca34b21.name: Notify SOC Team Lead
action--a7b560cb-d1ed-48f5-915b-9ca34b21.description: Send notification to SOC Team Lead with investigation summary and actions taken

commands.command: Send email notification to SOC Team Lead with phishing incident summary

action--2abab70c-bad8-4a9f-8f80-c45b0200.name: Update Case Status
action--2abab70c-bad8-4a9f-8f80-c45b0200.description: Update the incident ticket with investigation findings and close if clean

email_id.description: The ID of the reported phishing email

malicious_urls.description: List of malicious URLs found in the email

verdict.description: Final verdict: malicious, suspicious, or clean
